title: Vendored abfall GC and Beskid heap integration

source.subject: feat(runtime): vendored abfall GC and Beskid heap integration

body:
## Outcome

Vendored abfall GC and Beskid heap integration.

## Context

- Workstream **codegen-runtime** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **Fibers, channels, and GC runtime** (`v02-concurrency-runtime`).
- **abfall** is vendored for Beskid heap/GC integration; platform-spec GC chapters track runtime alignment.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`6ecd493`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/6ecd493) — feat(runtime): vendored abfall GC and Beskid heap integration
